examples: If you think you can change your life in a clever way, the way an advertiser can get you to buy an air freshener, you're probably wrong.
Chewing gum, once bought primarily by adolescent boys, is now featured in commercials as a breath freshener and teeth cleanser for use after a meal.
Why not try spraying some air freshener? That might help.
No prizes for guessing what is used in a simulated tear-gas attack: a canned air-freshener.
Unlike Asian consumers, Americans still see gum mainly as a breath freshener.
